meta.title: DEF CON 29 Red Team Village - Panel - The future of AI, Machine Learning, and Offensive Security
meta.description:
A panel discussion in collaboration with the DEF CON AI Village.
Speakers: Bruce Schneier, Anita Nikolich (University of Illinois), Chris Cottrell (NVIDIA), Rich Harang (DUO), Ram Shankar (Microsoft), and Omar Santos (Cisco).
